context: Tests whether the agent produces onboarding materials that include the correct ElevenLabs URLs, key creation guidance, permission advice, validation approach, and storage configuration.

checklist.name: API keys page URL
checklist.description: The instructions include the URL https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys for getting an API key

checklist.name: Sign-up URL
checklist.description: The instructions include the URL https://elevenlabs.io/app/sign-up for users who need to create an account

checklist.name: Key permission guidance
checklist.description: The instructions mention setting permissions on the key, specifically mentioning 'User' permission or 'Read' permission level

checklist.name: Copy key warning
checklist.description: The instructions warn that the key is only shown once and must be copied immediately

checklist.name: Validation uses xi-api-key
checklist.description: The script uses 'xi-api-key' as the header name in the curl command for validation (not -u, not Authorization, not x-api-key)

checklist.name: Validation endpoint /v1/user
checklist.description: The script validates the key against https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/user

checklist.name: Saves to .env file
checklist.description: The script saves the validated key to a .env file

checklist.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY variable
checklist.description: The key is saved with the variable name ELEVENLABS_API_KEY

checklist.name: Retry on failure
checklist.description: When validation fails, the script allows the user to try entering the key again (at least one retry)

checklist.name: URL reminder on failure
checklist.description: When validation fails, the script reminds the user of the API keys page URL (https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys)
